LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT JOHN WHITE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED UNTIL SEPTEMBER 14, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS IN COMPLIANCE WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY SHALL PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES TO THE COURT BY AUGUST 29, 2012. MOVING PARTY SHALL RE-NOTICE THE HEARING ON THE DEMURRER AND SERVE IT ON PLAINTIFF. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-24-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JOHN WHITE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. ON AUGUST 30, 2012, THE COURT STRUCK THE FILING BECAUSE THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO PAY THE REQUIRED FEES. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-06-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-06-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., appearing specially for Creditone, LLC.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Joh H. White.
Declaration of Plaintiff Suzanne Middleton pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Creditone and against Defendant John H. White as follows:
Principal $7,459.21
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $287.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $7,746.71
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-24-2012 Set For Trial On May-06-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JOHN WHITE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar. On August 30, 2012, the Court struck the filing because the moving party failed to pay the required fees. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-24-2012 Continued To Sep-14-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JOHN WHITE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Continued until September 14, 2012 at 9:30 AM in Dept. 302. Moving party failed to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party shall provide courtesy copies to the Court by August 29, 2012. Moving party shall re-notice the hearing on the demurrer and serve it on Plaintiff. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Aug-15-2012 Denied
